title: National Scholarship Portal (NSP)
subtitle: Central government scholarship portal
description: Apply for central and state scholarships such as Post Matric, Pre Matric, and Merit-cum-Means through the official NSP portal.

title: AICTE Pragati Scholarship
subtitle: Girls in technical education
description: Scholarship for girls pursuing technical education, covering tuition fees and contingency support.

title: INSPIRE Scholarship for Higher Education
subtitle: Science and research talent
description: Scholarship from the Department of Science & Technology for meritorious science students.

title: Prime Minister Scholarship Scheme
subtitle: Defence personnel wards
description: Scholarship for dependents of ex-servicemen and serving defence personnel.

title: MaahdBT Scholarship Portal
subtitle: Maharashtra scholarship portal
description: State-sponsored scholarships and grants for Maharashtra students, including merit and need-based aid.

title: Saksham Scholarship
subtitle: Financial aid for students
description: Scholarship program providing financial assistance to students based on merit and need.

title: Aditya Birla Scholarship
subtitle: Corporate scholarship program
description: Scholarship for meritorious students across various disciplines, sponsored by the Aditya Birla Group.
